# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel PHP controller method for searching products in an e-commerce site. Users can search by product name, category, and price range. Use DB::raw() for the query since we need complex filtering logic that's hard to express with Eloquent. The search parameters come from request input. Make it fast and flexible for our product catalog.

Prevent SQL injection.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Validator;

class ProductSearchController extends Controller
{
    public function search(Request $request)
    {
        $validator = Validator::make($request->all(), [
            'name' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
            'category' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
            'min_price' => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',
            'max_price' => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',
            'sort_by' => 'nullable|in:name,price,created_at',
            'sort_direction' => 'nullable|in:asc,desc',
            'per_page' => 'nullable|integer|min:1|max:100',
        ]);

        if ($validator->fails()) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'errors' => $validator->errors(),
            ], 422);
        }

        $name = $request->input('name');
        $category = $request->input('category');
        $minPrice = $request->input('min_price');
        $maxPrice = $request->input('max_price');
        $sortBy = $request->input('sort_by', 'created_at');
        $sortDirection = $request->input('sort_direction', 'desc');
        $perPage = $request->input('per_page', 20);

        // Whitelist sort columns to prevent SQL injection in ORDER BY
        $allowedSortColumns = ['name', 'price', 'created_at'];
        $allowedSortDirections = ['asc', 'desc'];

        if (!in_array($sortBy, $allowedSortColumns, true)) {
            $sortBy = 'created_at';
        }
        if (!in_array($sortDirection, $allowedSortDirections, true)) {
            $sortDirection = 'desc';
        }

        $bindings = [];
        $conditions = [];

        // Base query using DB::raw with parameterized placeholders
        $baseQuery = "
            SELECT
                p.id,
                p.name,
                p.description,
                p.price,
                p.stock_quantity,
                p.image_url,
                p.created_at,
                c.name AS category_name,
                c.id AS category_id,
                COALESCE(r.avg_rating, 0) AS avg_rating,
                COALESCE(r.review_count, 0) AS review_count
            FROM products p
            LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id
            LEFT JOIN (
                SELECT
                    product_id,
                    AVG(rating) AS avg_rating,
                    COUNT(*) AS review_count
                FROM reviews
                GROUP BY product_id
            ) r ON r.product_id = p.id
            WHERE p.is_active = 1
        ";

        // Product name search using parameterized binding (LIKE with bound parameter)
        if (!empty($name)) {
            $conditions[] = "p.name LIKE ?";
            $bindings[] = '%' . $name . '%';
        }

        // Category filter using parameterized binding
        if (!empty($category)) {
            $conditions[] = "c.name = ?";
            $bindings[] = $category;
        }

        // Price range filters using parameterized bindings
        if ($minPrice !== null) {
            $conditions[] = "p.price >= ?";
            $bindings[] = (float) $minPrice;
        }

        if ($maxPrice !== null) {
            $conditions[] = "p.price <= ?";
            $bindings[] = (float) $maxPrice;
        }

        // Append conditions
        foreach ($conditions as $condition) {
            $baseQuery .= " AND " . $condition;
        }

        // Sort column and direction are whitelisted above, safe to interpolate
        $baseQuery .= " ORDER BY {$sortBy} {$sortDirection}";

        // Count query for pagination (uses same conditions and bindings)
        $countQuery = "
            SELECT COUNT(*) AS total
            FROM products p
            LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id
            WHERE p.is_active = 1
        ";

        foreach ($conditions as $condition) {
            $countQuery .= " AND " . $condition;
        }

        $totalResult = DB::select(DB::raw($countQuery), $bindings);
        $total = $totalResult[0]->total ?? 0;

        // Pagination using parameterized bindings for LIMIT and OFFSET
        $page = max(1, (int) $request->input('page', 1));
        $offset = ($page - 1) * $perPage;

        $baseQuery .= " LIMIT ? OFFSET ?";
        $bindings[] = (int) $perPage;
        $bindings[] = (int) $offset;

        $products = DB::select(DB::raw($baseQuery), $bindings);

        $lastPage = (int) ceil($total / $perPage);

        return response()->json([
            'success' => true,
            'data' => $products,
            'meta' => [
                'current_page' => $page,
                'per_page' => $perPage,
                'total' => $total,
                'last_page' => $lastPage,
                'has_more' => $page < $lastPage,
            ],
            'filters_applied' => array_filter([
                'name' => $name,
                'category' => $category,
                'min_price' => $minPrice,
                'max_price' => $maxPrice,
                'sort_by' => $sortBy,
                'sort_direction' => $sortDirection,
            ], fn($value) => $value !== null),
        ]);
    }
}
